title: Classical Encryption Techniques Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the fundamental process of classical encryption, showing how plaintext is transformed into ciphertext and back using a key.
relationships: Plaintext is input into the Encryption Algorithm
Encryption Algorithm uses the Secret Key to transform Plaintext into Ciphertext
Ciphertext is input into the Decryption Algorithm
Decryption Algorithm uses the same Secret Key to transform Ciphertext back into Recovered Plaintext
